caption: In the shimmering glow of the neon-lit bar in a deserted winter market, cyberpunk heroine Lyra Rook sashays through rain-slicked streets, her silhouette dripping with confidence and mystery. She steals the spotlight from the drone traffic bridge, turning heads as holographic billboards flicker around her. Her daring fashion, a blend of sleek black leather and shimmering cybernetic accents, draws attention to her curvy chest and sculpted hips, making her a true icon of the city. ⚡💜 #cyberpunk #futurism #streetfashion #digitalart #neon
